sevenDayForecast.headline: Ex-tropical cyclone Jenna (11U) weakening over open waters of the Indian Ocean. Moving out of the Australian region and it will no longer be tracked.
points: A final Forecast Track Maps has been issued for Tropical Cyclone Jenna (11U) which should be referred to for more detailed information.
Ex-tropical cyclone Jenna is weakening and will move out of the Australian Area of Responsibility (90E) today.
This disturbance will not appear on subsequent forecasts.
